records.m_Talk_ENG: This is insane...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is insane...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is insane...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The CSE level on the monitors is skyrocketing by the minute!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The CSE level on the monitors is skyrocketing by the minute!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The CSE level on the monitors is skyrocketing by the minute!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen such a beautiful graph, not even in the stock market!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen such a beautiful graph, not even in the stock market!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen such a beautiful graph, not even in the stock market!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful, junk food.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful, junk food.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful, junk food.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's hard to believe people were still working here just a few hours ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's hard to believe people were still working here just a few hours ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's hard to believe people were still working here just a few hours ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even accounting for the Grand Dimension Crevice's influence, the rate of Corruption is far too fast...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even accounting for the Grand Dimension Crevice's influence, the rate of Corruption is far too fast...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even accounting for the Grand Dimension Crevice's influence, the rate of Corruption is far too fast...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn you, Richard! Being diligent at the worst possible times...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn you, Richard! Being diligent at the worst possible times...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn you, Richard! Being diligent at the worst possible times...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did he have to build an Eternium storeroom in every district and make us go through this hell?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did he have to build an Eternium storeroom in every district and make us go through this hell?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did he have to build an Eternium storeroom in every district and make us go through this hell?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why is the security level set to maximum, of all things?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why is the security level set to maximum, of all things?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why is the security level set to maximum, of all things?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do I look like, a master key? Why does a Grade S Counter have to manually open every door?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do I look like, a master key? Why does a Grade S Counter have to manually open every door?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do I look like, a master key? Why does a Grade S Counter have to manually open every door?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because Eternium can't be stockpiled in large quantities in a single location.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because Eternium can't be stockpiled in large quantities in a single location.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because Eternium can't be stockpiled in large quantities in a single location.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each district has different Eternium consumption needs, so procedurally speaking, it's a sound policy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each district has different Eternium consumption needs, so procedurally speaking, it's a sound policy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each district has different Eternium consumption needs, so procedurally speaking, it's a sound policy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While the Zodiac Knights defend the major strongpoints, we need to secure the Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While the Zodiac Knights defend the major strongpoints, we need to secure the Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While the Zodiac Knights defend the major strongpoints, we need to secure the Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To gather enough to operate the Track Switcher, we'll need to stop by two more storerooms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To gather enough to operate the Track Switcher, we'll need to stop by two more storerooms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To gather enough to operate the Track Switcher, we'll need to stop by two more storerooms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, that wonderful manual is what's tripping us up right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, that wonderful manual is what's tripping us up right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, that wonderful manual is what's tripping us up right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a pain in the butt, seriously!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a pain in the butt, seriously!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a pain in the butt, seriously!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This way. Let's get it over with quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This way. Let's get it over with quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This way. Let's get it over with quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Verifying system authorization.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Verification complete. Opening E-3 storage sector door.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Verification complete. Opening E-3 storage sector door.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Verification complete. Opening E-3 storage sector door.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Door opened.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Door opened.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Door opened.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa...! Just how much is all this worth...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa...! Just how much is all this worth...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa...! Just how much is all this worth...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: With a stockpile like this, you could live comfortably for the rest of your life...
records.m_Talk_DEU: With a stockpile like this, you could live comfortably for the rest of your life...
records.m_Talk_FRA: With a stockpile like this, you could live comfortably for the rest of your life...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Just comfortably? You could live like royalty forever, Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Just comfortably? You could live like royalty forever, Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Just comfortably? You could live like royalty forever, Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You two would be wise to abandon any thoughts of sneaking them away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You two would be wise to abandon any thoughts of sneaking them away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You two would be wise to abandon any thoughts of sneaking them away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All operational conditions are under strict supervision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All operational conditions are under strict supervision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All operational conditions are under strict supervision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't afford to botch everything because we're short even a handful of Eternium at the critical moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't afford to botch everything because we're short even a handful of Eternium at the critical moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't afford to botch everything because we're short even a handful of Eternium at the critical moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk. I know that already, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk. I know that already, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk. I know that already, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we just load everything onto the transport vehicles, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we just load everything onto the transport vehicles, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we just load everything onto the transport vehicles, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the treasures of this world are gifts bestowed by the queen...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the treasures of this world are gifts bestowed by the queen...
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the treasures of this world are gifts bestowed by the queen...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lowly creatures, bow your heads and bend your knees, and praise her will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lowly creatures, bow your heads and bend your knees, and praise her will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lowly creatures, bow your heads and bend your knees, and praise her will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, it seems we need to settle a trivial civil dispute.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, it seems we need to settle a trivial civil dispute.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, it seems we need to settle a trivial civil dispute.
